transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
Today, I'm here at a famous intestine restaurant in Ilsan
I was told there's something special about this place
I'm here to try it
[Hosu Intestines BBQ Restaurant]
They specialize in giblets
[Reading off the menu]
I'm going to try everything
Yes, I can do it
All of them come with garlic on the bottom
Let's go ahead and order
Excuse me,
I'll do 3 orders of the Garlic Tripe BBQ and a cider, please
That looks good
I'm so hungry right now
Thank you

There's a lot of garlic on the bottom
Yes, we crushed the domestic garlic here
That's really a lot of garlic
Since this doesn't have fat, we used sesame oil
Look at all the garlic that's cooked on the bottom
Is it ready? Thank you
This is really thick All the mountain chain tripe I had were much smaller than this
But look how thick it is
Let's try it
Wow, the texture I need the mic
It's really good
The texture is amazing Is this how it's supposed to be?
Check out the sound
It's really crunchy
It sounds like kimchi
The scent

No soju (Korean alcoholic drink)
It's louder than kimchi
That was kimchi
I'll show you the comparison
That's so cool How is the texture like this?
My whole life has been a lie
I've always thought these were tough to chew
But this is just chewy
It's very delicious
Beef livers!
I like them
Dip it in the sesame oil
That's so good
I like beef livers, but not the omasum tripe
But it's tasty at some places
And not good at other places

Let's try it
This is good
Excuse me, can I have the mountain chain tripe and the tripe bbq as well?
1 regular and 1 mountain chain
Some bean sprouts too
With 2 pieces
Ta-da
2 pieces
And kimchi on top
The liver is very fresh
We get it fresh in the morning
It's from this morning?
We get it every fresh morning
So if I come here in the morning, it will be throbbing?!
Is that edible?
It's just very warm Really?

I just got goosebumps
Some freshly made kimchi
And 3 pieces of meat
That looks good
This would make a great fried rice
Yummy
I finished it all
I want to scrape up all the garlic and take it home
This is such a waste
I'm going to put them on here because it's tasty
The thick one is the mountain chain
The other one wasn't? It was
But this just doesn't have the garlic
This is the bottom part of the stomach
This part is very good
Yes this one is the regular tripe

Well, it's not that thin either
The regular one is ready
I'll try it Is it different?
Try it
It's good
It's a lot more tender
The other one was crunchy and chewy
While this one is very soft
The regular one tastes amazing too
That was the sound of the regular tripe
It's definitely different
But they're both tasty
Good in different ways
That texture
This time,
They have 2 types of beef small intestines

Let's compare the two
Excuse me, can I have the special and regular beef small intestines?
1 order each? Yes 1 each, please
Let's put 3 pieces
And cooked garlic
On top
It's good
Last tripe
It's thicker
Thicc
Their thickness is different
Small intestine is love
That bread looks good
The fat is oozing out
The special intestine is huge
This looks so good

Crazy
Oh no the potatoes are getting burnt
Please
Hot
This is the regular one Look at the fat
It's filled
That's good
This is the special one
To be honest, it's really tasty
But the special one was too impactful
That's so good
I thought I'd like the regular small intestines better because it's what I always eat
But the special one takes the win
With some fresh kimchi
Wrap it
Special beef intestines

Dip it and stack
Some garlic too
Garlic really does it
I'm a potato killer
It's cooked golden
These potatoes were cooked in this meat grease It's the best
3 pieces of beef small intestines
Completely filled with fat
Oh right, order
Large intestines, abomasum, and heart please
The heart is for later, right?
I've never seen an uncooked heart before Wait, I have
You can cook them 1 by 1 and eat it right away after slightly cooking it
Abomasum
It's thick
Let's try it

That's so good
It's very tender compared to other places
Dip it
And get some garlic
Garlic tastes amazing
Small intestine is the truth
I don't care if I eat it again
Can I cook this here? The heart
What is this
That's so good
It's soft
Chewy and tender
Let's cook them 1 by 1
That's a big piece
I better make myself a large intestine skewer
Skewer!

[Founder of the restaurant] Her jaw must hurt
But she just constantly chews
[2nd owner] I was doubtful at first
But after seeing her eat in person,
It was more than expected
[Grand-daughter] Stomach of Steel
2 servings of brisket, and
Can I do tripe fried rice?
We use the tripe leftover from your grill to make the fried rice with radish kimchi
Then 1 of that,
2 servings of brisket,
Intestine soup too
I have to try everything on the menu
Here comes the choo choo train
Let's cook the rest of the heart
Take this much brisket at once

[Some heart too]
So good
[2 pieces now]
[5 more pieces]
That's a lot
It doesn't matter how the brisket is cooked It's delicious
Looks yummy
Radish kimchi, tripe, etc
This looks so good Let's try it
I would've ordered the noodles too if I had more time
But I've been here for too long That's a bummer
Some brisket with the fried rice
My ears and nose are clogged (It means that it's incredible)
Right, my nose is always clogged
It's hot
Some intestine soup

I was going to eat it later after it cools down
[Another one]
[Hot food after another]
Crispy rice
That's insane
The crispy rice is so yummy
I think this all depends on what kind of grill you're using
[Trying to get every last bit of the rice]
[I will eat it all]
[Cleared]
[She ended up getting the noodles too]
Let's put some brisket in here
[Self-made brisket noodles]
It tastes amazing with the brisket
[Aggressive Noodle Slurp]
[A perfect finish]

I think I ate a lot today
A little bit
It's just mysterious to how much she can eat with that kind of body
[Reading off what she ate]
We gave you the Omasum on the house So you had a taste of that
[Reading off rest of the order]
You ate all of that 15 servings of food
But you look like you didn't even eat a meal yet
That is all for today
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
